store_status: live on App Store + TestFlight (App ID 6767132632, com.innerscope.iheartest). Ledger/brain: v1.5.21/Build 50 LIVE on TestFlight (dup-const ICON_CHECK hotfix); App Store public. Local checkout main is behind at v1.5.18/Build 46 (commit 70c51a4).
stack: Vanilla-JS Capacitor 8 (8.3.x), NO bundler. 21 plain-script modules in www/js/ loaded as <script> tags; dual browser-global + guarded-CJS export pattern so Vitest can require(). Capacitor 8.3.1 (ios/android/app/browser/haptics/local-notifications/preferences/push/share/splash/status-bar). No React, no Vite, no TypeScript app code, no pnpm monorepo. Dev tooling: vitest 4 + typescript 5 only.
current_state: Most mature app in the fleet: live on the App Store and iterated through ~50 builds. 242 unit tests / 23 specs all green (verified locally), real web-ci with compliance grep + i18n gate + font/link audits. PostHog (project 468379) and Sentry both wired and PHI-safe (categorical category_band only leaves device; phi-leak.spec + posthog-shape.spec enforce it). Custom animated launch splash ("million-dollar app" craft direction). Local checkout main = v1.5.18/Build 46 on branch claude/boot-gate-render with a clean tree; the durable ledger/brain say v1.5.21/Build 50 is the LIVE TestFlight build of record (ICON_CHECK dup-const hotfix atop Build 49 clinical content) and the App Store version is public. Half-done: external 75-tester rollout is gated on a founder-video re-record ("licensed audiologist" line is inaccurate, Mark is a retired HIS not Au.D.) and a Matt+counsel sign-off on the results-screen device pricing/returns card; the Sharpen auditory-training upsell has no authored clinical protocol (commercial blocker); Section-4 clinical (A1) features remain CPO-gated.

features.design_system_uikit: no - bespoke hand-rolled CSS (www/css/style.css) + 21 vanilla-JS modules; no shared design-system/ui-kit package, not Ionic, not the standardized React UI kit
features.boot_render_gate: partial - there is an animated launch splash and the active branch is claude/boot-gate-render, but no boot-smoke Playwright spec exists in qa/; maestro 01-cold-launch.yaml is the closest, and the Build 49->50 all-buttons-dead dup-const regression is exactly what a boot-gate would have caught (it did not, because there is no WebKit boot-error gate)
features.telemetry_posthog: yes - posthog-config.js project 468379, PHI-safe by construction (categorical-only properties, autocapture off, inputs always masked, REPLAY_LOCKDOWN stage-gate for replay text), enforced by qa/unit/posthog-shape.spec.js + the compliance grep
features.ota_capgo_signed: no - zero Capgo / @capgo/capacitor-updater / live-update anywhere; package-lock has 0 hits. iHEARtest has NO OTA, so every web-layer change needs a full Depot build (called out as a known constraint in the CTO ledger)
features.paywall_revenuecat: no - the app is FREE (App Store subtitle: 'Free at-home hearing check'); monetization is the device-recommendation upsell + Call-a-Pro affiliate flow (recommendations.js / tools.js), NOT subscriptions. No RevenueCat SDK (@revenuecat/purchases-capacitor absent; only a single comment reference in app.js)
features.sentry: yes - sentry-config.js with a PHI-scrubbing beforeSend (REDACT_PATTERNS), DSN injected at build time, linked to PostHog session replay URL. Verified manually pre-release (sentry-scrub-verify.mjs is excluded from web-ci because Playwright is not a dep)
features.ten_million_splash_craft: partial - custom animated launch splash (vignette/beam/arc/wordmark, www/index.html + style.css 'million-dollar app feel'), polished iterated UI, but it is bespoke per-app craft, not the standardized $10M splash/craft component
features.focus_group_90: partial - rich buyer focus-group harness (qa/focus-group-buyers, 16 personas, R1-R4) but it is a CUSTOM harness scored out of 10 (R4: ease 8.4 / trust 7.0 / value 7.2 = ~73-84%), NOT the standard focus-group-loop.mjs tool and NOT at the >=90% gate. Mark Moore review ritual is the real quality gate and is build-by-build green-ish but SHIP-IT for Build 50 is pending
features.accessibility_gate: partial - strong senior-first accessibility IN the app (user-font-scale picker, ~92 a11y attrs/refs in index.html+css, dark mode, large targets per Mark reviews) but NO axe-core / a11y CI gate; web-ci has no accessibility step
features.app_health_medic: no - no app-health-medic wired; the 'medic'/'health' grep hits are plain content words in glossary/content/articles, not the fleet app-health-medic

template_distance: hard-rewrite - this is a no-bundler vanilla-JS www app (21 plain <script> modules, browser-global + guarded-CJS pattern). The standardized template is React19+Vite5+Capacitor8 in a pnpm monorepo with design-system/nav/telemetry/auth/data/paywall packages. Getting iHEARtest ONTO the template means re-authoring every screen as React components, replacing the hand-rolled CSS with the design-system package, porting the audiometry engine (audiotest.js/audio.js/calibration.js/tiers.js) into a shared package, and migrating 242 Vitest specs. The Capacitor 8 shell, the depot-macos-26 CI pipeline, the PHI-safe PostHog/Sentry posture, and the tier/compliance logic are reusable assets, but the UI layer is a full rewrite. This is the fleet's most battle-tested app, so it is the highest-risk rewrite (most to lose) even though it is the highest-quality codebase.
launch_blockers: Founder-welcome video says 'a licensed audiologist reviews every version' which is inaccurate (Mark Moore is a retired HIS, not an Au.D.); needs re-record + counsel/marketing sign-off before external 75-tester rollout
Results-screen device pricing/returns card needs Matt + counsel sign-off (FTC/pricing claims)
Mark Moore device-verify SHIP-IT on Build 50 is pending; no 75-tester external rollout without it (the Mark review ritual is sacred)
No OTA: every web-layer fix requires a full Depot build + ASC review cycle (no Capgo), so the iteration loop to fix launch-blocking bugs is slow
No boot/render gate: the Build 49->50 'all buttons dead' dup-const regression shipped to TestFlight; without a WebKit boot-smoke gate this class of crash can reach users again

iOS signing durable fix still PENDING (DIST_CERT_P12 + provisioning profile as Actions secrets); interim is manually revoking orphan Created-via-API dev certs before each build (fleet-wide Depot cert-cap problem)
Local main (Build 46) is behind the live build-of-record (Build 50); the source state must be reconciled/fast-forwarded before further work to avoid building stale binaries
compliance_gates: FTC/clinical: Section-4 clinical features (A1 binaural-average HN beyond what shipped, advanced clinical claims) BLOCKED behind CPO + Matt gate; no diagnostic/medical-device claims

FTC HBNR + WA MHMDA + CA CCPA: only category_band may leave the device; raw thresholds / Hearing Number / audiogram never do (enforced by compliance grep + phi-leak spec). REPLAY_LOCKDOWN must be flipped true before general-public release so rendered Hearing Number is not replay-captured

FTC advertising: Mark Moore trust copy must stay experience-based (70+ clinics, 10,000+ patients) with NO Au.D./licensing/credential claim; founder video currently violates this and must be re-recorded
Pricing/returns claims on device cards (free returns, named products) require counsel sign-off
Sharpen auditory-training upsell needs an authored, defensible clinical-outcomes protocol before any improvement claim (Matt + Mark, content task, not engineering)
Securities firewall: no INND/forward-looking statements in store metadata or copy
recommended_path: Treat iHEARtest as a KEEP-AND-LIFT, not a same-quarter port. Phase 1 (now, no template): reconcile local main to the live Build 50 source, then ship the $10M cross-cutting infra into the existing www app without rewriting it - add the boot-gate boot-smoke Playwright spec to web-ci (it would have caught the Build 50 dead-buttons regression), wire app-health-medic, add an axe-core a11y CI gate (the in-app a11y is already strong), and add Capgo signed+pinned OTA so future web-layer fixes ship without a full Depot cycle. Resolve the durable iOS signing fix (fastlane match or DIST_CERT_P12 secrets). Phase 2 (template migration, separate L/XL workstream): build the standardized React19+Vite5+pnpm monorepo template FIRST against a simpler app (AWARE or the app-template PR #1 already in flight), prove it on TestFlight, then port iHEARtest screen-by-screen onto it - extracting the audiometry engine + tiers/compliance logic into shared packages and migrating the 242 specs - because iHEARtest is the highest-value, highest-risk rewrite and should go last once the template is hardened. RevenueCat is NOT needed for launch (this app is free by design); only wire it if a paid Sharpen tier is greenlit. The actual launch unblock is human-owned: founder-video re-record + device-card counsel sign-off + Mark's Build 50 SHIP-IT.
effort: XL - full template rewrite of a 21-module no-bundler vanilla-JS app with a 242-test suite and a clinical audiometry engine; the infra-lift portion alone (boot-gate/OTA/a11y-gate/signing) is M, the React+Vite monorepo port is XL.
one_line_verdict: The fleet's most mature, best-tested, App-Store-live app, with PHI-safe PostHog+Sentry and a real CI gate, but it is a no-bundler vanilla-JS www app (hard-rewrite onto the React/Vite template) that is missing RevenueCat (free by design), Capgo OTA, a boot-gate, an a11y CI gate, and app-health-medic; launch is human-gated on a founder-video re-record, device-card counsel sign-off, and Mark's Build 50 SHIP-IT.

store_status: live on TestFlight (v1.3.0, last green Codemagic build 2026-06-10); ASC record EXISTS (Apple ID 6772572839, bundle com.innerscope.aware); NOT on public App Store. (Company-brain claim "ASC record not yet created" is stale; codemagic.yaml + app.manifest.json confirm the record exists.)
stack: Vanilla-JS Capacitor 8 (8.3.1) www/ app, NO framework, NO bundler. 44 plain script tags in www/index.html; ~38 screens of hand-written JS (app.js alone is 231KB). Node 22.22.2. i18n en/es/it/ko. iOS-first (Android dormant). RevenueCat 13.1.2 + Capgo capacitor-updater 8.50.1. Deps: @capacitor/* ^8.3.1.
current_state: Forked from iHEARtest V1.3.0 (May 2026), fully rebranded (teal #0d9488). Live on TestFlight at v1.3.0; last green build was Codemagic (2026-06-10). The just-merged work cited in the prompt (PR #33: PHI-safe PostHog + hardened Capgo OTA) is actually UNMERGED: commits c9e024f/e855d7a/ea5d70b sit on branch claude/boot-gate-render, which is just a fresh branch off the PR#33 tip with ZERO additional commits over origin/main, so the branch name's "boot-gate" work has NOT been implemented. PostHog init (www/js/posthog-init.js) is genuinely PHI-safe (replay off, autocapture off, pageview off, denylist scrub) but the key is empty pending build-time injection. Capgo OTA is wired but deliberately autoUpdate:false and version-pinned; the signed+pinned channel (Ed25519 key, private channelUrl) is NOT configured yet (CTO out-of-band gate). Sentry + RevenueCat (pro entitlement entl9db7395584, 3 products) are wired. CI has syntax+unit (vitest 138 tests)+axe a11y (required) plus e2e (Chromium+WebKit) and visual gates earning a track record. Repo CLAUDE.md is stale ("no PostHog yet, no OTA yet", "Codemagic"); app.manifest.json is the fresher source.

features.design_system_uikit: no — hand-rolled CSS in www/css + a 45-SVG line-icon system; no shared design-system/ui-kit package, not Ionic, no React component library. Brand tokens exist (teal #0d9488) but only as ad-hoc CSS.
features.boot_render_gate: partial — qa/e2e/lib.mjs bootApp() captures pageerror during e2e flows, but the standardized boot-gate (WebKit @ iPhone 16 Pro 402x874 boot-smoke that fails on stuck splash/green/white/empty-body) is NOT present; the claude/boot-gate-render branch has no boot-gate code committed.
features.telemetry_posthog: partial — PHI-safe PostHogShim is correctly written (replay/autocapture/pageview OFF, scrub denylist) but lives UNMERGED on a branch (PR #33) and POSTHOG_API_KEY is empty (build-time injection + AWARE PostHog project key pending CTO).
features.ota_capgo_signed: partial — @capgo/capacitor-updater pinned to 8.50.1, but autoUpdate:false by design; the signed+pinned live channel (Ed25519 keypair, publicKey, private channelUrl/updateUrl, signed bundles) is explicitly NOT configured yet. Hardened default, not a live signed OTA.
features.paywall_revenuecat: yes — @revenuecat/purchases-capacitor 13.1.2 wired in www/js/purchases.js + paywall.js; pro entitlement (entl9db7395584), 3 products (aware_pro_monthly/annual/lifetime), cached pro state in Preferences.
features.sentry: yes — wired in www/js/sentry-init.js (SentryShim), no-op-safe without DSN.
features.ten_million_splash_craft: partial — animated HTML splash overlay (www/js/splash-overlay.js, ~3s branded mark draw-in + wordmark + tagline) over a native teal launch image; App Store screenshots v2 set delivered. Premium intent present but not a React/design-system-grade polished surface; no $10M template craft baseline.
features.focus_group_90: partial — multiple persona focus-group rounds exist (qa/focus-group round-1/2/3, focus-group-buyers, focus-group-hearingaid with CONSENSUS/FIX_LIST docs) but these predate the standardized focus-group-loop skill and there is no recorded >=90% average gate result in the manifest.
features.accessibility_gate: yes — axe-core WCAG 2.2 A+AA gate is REQUIRED in branch protection (qa/a11y/run-a11y-gate.mjs, 6 surfaces, critical/serious fail the job); senior-first 1.5x text scale, large targets, contrast are hard rails.
features.app_health_medic: no — no app-health-medic / fleet-medic instrumentation wired in this repo; Sentry is the only error signal and PostHog is not yet merged/keyed.

template_distance: hard-rewrite — this is a no-framework, no-bundler vanilla-JS www/ app (44 plain script tags, 231KB app.js, hand-written DOM). The standardized template is a React19+Vite+Capacitor8 pnpm monorepo with design-system/nav/telemetry/auth/data/paywall packages. Getting AWARE ONTO that template means re-implementing ~38 screens in React/Vite and re-homing all logic (snr-engine, training tasks, simulator, family-loop, i18n) into shared packages. Nothing in the current www/ ports cleanly; only the brand tokens, copy, i18n dictionaries, and the PHI-safe telemetry posture carry over conceptually.
launch_blockers: iOS CI is still Codemagic-only (codemagic.yaml present, NO .github/workflows/ios-depot.yml) — violates the fleet Depot-only directive; must port iHEARtest's ios-depot.yml (runner depot-macos-26) and cut over before any further build.
PR #33 (PHI-safe PostHog + Capgo OTA) is UNMERGED on branch claude/boot-gate-render and awaits CTO gates: AWARE PostHog project + key injection into env-config.js, pnpm/npm lock, cap sync.

Capgo OTA channel is not yet signed/pinned-live: Ed25519 keypair (private key in Secret Manager), publicKey, private channelUrl/updateUrl, signed bundles — all pending CTO out-of-band setup before autoUpdate can be enabled.
No standardized boot/render gate (boot-smoke WebKit @ iPhone 16 Pro) wired; risk of compiles-green-dead-on-device.
Repo CLAUDE.md is stale (says no PostHog/no OTA, Codemagic) and will misdirect the next session; needs reconciliation to Depot + PostHog/OTA reality.
Build numbering must move from the retired Codemagic counter (last build 53) to ASC CFBundleVersion on cutover.
App Store screenshots v2 set awaits Matt's approval before ASC upload; paywall pricing finding flagged for Matt in HANDOFF.
compliance_gates: FDA: never claim FDA approval or clearance (hard rail in CLAUDE.md).

FTC: never claim AWARE cures/restores hearing or treats/prevents dementia or cognitive decline; 'may help' framing only; no diagnosis claims. Listing/marketing copy must pass the claims firewall (human + counsel owned).
Securities (Reg FD): seller of record is InnerScope (OTC: INND), a public company — no forward-looking revenue statements in code or store metadata; INND-facing copy is attorney/Matt gated.
Paywall pricing decision flagged for Matt (HANDOFF) — business/pricing sign-off, human-owned.

No COPPA/PHI exposure (non-PHI ring, audience 50-75); PostHog posture keeps it categorical-only, but confirm no audiogram/threshold/dB values ever leave device (the scrub denylist enforces this as a backstop).
recommended_path: Two-track. SHORT TERM (ship the current vanilla-JS app, do NOT block on template): (1) merge PR #33 after CTO gates — create the AWARE PostHog project, inject the key into env-config.js, run cap sync; (2) port iHEARtest's ios-depot.yml (depot-macos-26, dispatch-only, CFBundleVersion numbering) and retire codemagic.yaml; (3) wire the standardized boot-gate (boot-smoke WebKit @ iPhone 16 Pro) + app-health-medic; (4) configure the signed+pinned Capgo channel (Ed25519 key in Secret Manager) before enabling autoUpdate; (5) reconcile the stale CLAUDE.md; (6) run the focus-group-loop skill to a recorded >=90% and get Matt's screenshot/pricing sign-off; then CTO-dispatch the first Depot build and submit to App Store. LONG TERM (get onto the $10M template): schedule a hard-rewrite of the ~38 screens into the React19+Vite+Capacitor8 pnpm monorepo, re-homing logic into shared design-system/telemetry/paywall/data packages and carrying over brand tokens, i18n dictionaries, and the PHI-safe telemetry posture. Do not gate the near-term TestFlight->App Store launch on the template migration.
effort: L — short-term launch hardening (Depot cutover + merge PR#33 + boot-gate/medic + signed OTA + sign-offs) is M; the full template migration (hard-rewrite of 38 vanilla-JS screens into the React monorepo) is XL on its own.
one_line_verdict: A polished, TestFlight-live vanilla-JS Capacitor app with strong a11y and a genuinely PHI-safe (but unmerged) PostHog posture; it can ship to the App Store soon after a Depot CI cutover + merging PR #33 + a signed OTA channel, but it is a hard-rewrite away from running on the standardized React monorepo template.

ring: non-PHI (self-imposed v1: no symptoms/conditions/diagnoses collected, keeps it outside HIPAA; PHI ring is a hard wall if any health feature is added. Backend touches Vertex Gemini Live/Vision + Firebase but processes no PHI)
store_status: pre-build / scaffold-plus. NOT live, NOT on TestFlight. No App Store Connect app record created yet (POST /v1/apps is API-forbidden, so it is the documented one human step; bundle id com.otchealth.companion IS registered, record 2WJ8RXNXYM, team 465UF9H72S, IAP/PUSH/APP_GROUPS capabilities enabled). No iOS build has ever run (the ios-depot workflow is not on main).
stack: React 19 + Vite 6 + Ionic 8 + Capacitor 8 (8.x) pnpm monorepo. apps/mobile (Capacitor 8 web shell), apps/backend (Fastify 5 on Cloud Run), packages/shared (TS types + pricing.ts source of truth). Data: Neon Postgres + Drizzle, Firestore, Firebase Auth (+ biometric). AI: Vertex Gemini 2.5 Flash (vision), Gemini Live 2.5 Flash native-audio (push-to-talk), Chirp 3 HD TTS, ElevenLabs voice cloning. Node 22, pnpm 9.
current_state: Substantial functional build, well past scaffold. Backend is real: 20+ Fastify routes (assistant/vision, live token, families, feed, reactions, checkins, notebook w/ crypto, voice-clones, entitlements, revenuecat webhook, scam-reports, account-deletion) + matching services (gemini-vision with senior system prompt + scam guidance, gemini-live, usage-caps, notebook-crypto, tts), 5 backend test files (20/20 pass on main per HANDOFF). Mobile has feature areas (assistant TalkButton/VisionResultCard, auth, feed, checkin, paywall, voice-clone enrollment) + a strong senior-accessibility store (largeText default, 64x64 BigButton, AAA) + a full premium design pass (locked app icon, splash, 32 icons, 50 illustrations, 15 custom Lottie, 8 chimes, 17 voiceovers, store screenshots, preview videos). PR #1 (Days 1-24 + design + assets) is MERGED to main (963526d). CI exists on main (typecheck+backend tests+prettier). HALF-DONE / NOT ON MAIN: ios-depot.yml (branch claude/companion-ios-depot-port, ~PR#14), mobile vitest+axe test gate (branch claude/companion-mobile-test-gate, ~PR#13), and the boot-gate (ErrorBoundary + main.tsx boot/splash-hide/data-boot-ready + playwright config exist only on the local claude/boot-gate-render branch with uncommitted changes). codemagic.yaml is still present and dead. No iOS build has been produced or dispatched.
template_distance: easy-migrate. It is already the target SHAPE (React19 + Vite6 + Capacitor8 pnpm monorepo with apps/mobile + apps/backend + packages/shared), unlike the vanilla-JS www apps that are hard-rewrites. The gaps are additive packages, not a rewrite: adopt the shared @otchealth design-system/telemetry/auth/paywall/data/nav packages, add PostHog + Capgo OTA, merge the in-flight boot-gate and test gate. The one real divergence is UI: Ionic 8 vs the template's tokens.css + Tailwind v4 + house components + lucide-react, so the senior UI layer (BigButton/LottieView/Ionic pages) would need reconciliation with the house design system rather than a straight swap.
launch_blockers: No App Store Connect app record exists yet (human-only: POST /v1/apps is API-forbidden). Documented one-pager exists at docs/APP_STORE_CONNECT_SETUP.md but the record has not been created.

iOS build pipeline not on main: ios-depot.yml lives on unmerged branch claude/companion-ios-depot-port and has NEVER been dispatched/validated. Its 4 ASC secrets (ASC_KEY_ID/ASC_ISSUER_ID/ASC_P8_KEY/APPLE_TEAM_ID) are not yet set on the repo. First dispatch is the proving run (CTO-only).

No iOS build has ever been produced; first build = CFBundleVersion 1. Fleet-wide Depot signing gotcha applies (-allowProvisioningUpdates mints throwaway certs, hits Apple cert cap; durable fix = managed .p12+profile, not yet in place).

Boot/render gate not merged to main (only on local claude/boot-gate-render); the app could ship the FourVault/PlantID silent-splash failure mode until merged. main.tsx boot logic + ErrorBoundary + WebKit boot-smoke must land on main and run in CI.
No mobile frontend tests on main (vitest+axe gate is on unmerged claude/companion-mobile-test-gate); only backend has 5 test files. No e2e on main.
No product telemetry: PostHog absent entirely (project 468389 assigned but no key/SDK wired) so a shipped build would be a measurement black box.
No OTA: Capgo not integrated, so every web-layer fix needs a full TestFlight build.
RevenueCat IAP products / paywall not yet validated end-to-end against a live ASC app + offerings (REVENUECAT_APP_STORE_SETUP.md documents the steps but app record is prerequisite).
Backend (Cloud Run) deploy + Firebase + Neon production provisioning must be confirmed live before the app is functional on device (cloudbuild.yaml present; SECRETS_STATUS.md tracks provisioning).
compliance_gates: No medical advice (FTC/FDA): hard product rule, enforced in the gemini-vision system prompt (pill/health questions route to pharmacist/doctor). Any drift into diagnosis/dosage is a violation. Human/CMO-owned.

Non-PHI ring (HIPAA): v1 collects no symptoms/conditions/diagnoses by design. Adding any health-data feature requires explicit sign-off and would pull the app into the BAA/PHI ring (currently carved OUT of telemetry and the gateway).

Consented voice cloning: a clone may only be created after an in-app consent recording in the speaker's own voice; consent stored while clone active; one-tap revocation; never clone from third-party audio. ElevenLabs data-retention disclosure must appear on the consent screen. Legal/CMO-gated.

Senior accessibility as a hard requirement (not just polish): 64x64 targets, 20pt body, WCAG AAA body contrast, VoiceOver/TalkBack labels, no swipe-to-delete/double-tap. Must stay green in the a11y gate.
iOS Share Extension may draw App Store review questions (App Group + extension-safe API); fallback is to ship v1 without it. Reviewer-facing.
OTCHealth branding 'from the makers of iHEARtest' and no em/en dashes in published copy.
recommended_path: 1) Land the three in-flight workstreams to main in order: merge the mobile vitest+axe test gate (PR#13 branch) and the boot-gate (ErrorBoundary + main.tsx boot/splash-hide/data-boot-ready + WebKit boot-smoke spec, wired into CI), then merge ios-depot.yml (PR#14 branch). 2) CTO sets the 4 ASC secrets from Secret Manager and Matt creates the ASC app record per docs/APP_STORE_CONNECT_SETUP.md (the single human gate). 3) Wire the missing $10M features as additive packages: PostHog (project 468389, public phc_ key as repo VARIABLE, PHI-safe categorical events) + Capgo OTA (@capgo/capacitor-updater, dev channel auto-update from main, GA-gated prod channel, new Capgo app on first upload) + adopt the shared @otchealth design-system/telemetry/nav packages and reconcile the Ionic senior UI against tokens.css+lucide. 4) Confirm Cloud Run + Firebase + Neon production deploy and RevenueCat offerings against the live ASC app. 5) Run the focus-group-loop to >=90% on rendered screenshots and wire app-health-medic (Sentry-backed health read). 6) CTO dispatches the first ios-depot build (CFBundleVersion 1) to TestFlight as the proving run, validate signing, then internal QA on the iPhone 16 Pro before any external rollout.
effort: M (the app body and design are largely built; remaining work is merge-the-WIP + first-build proving + bolt on PostHog/Capgo/design-system + production deploy verification, not a rewrite). Trends toward L only if the Ionic-to-house-design-system reconciliation is pursued aggressively.
one_line_verdict: A genuinely substantial, premium-feeling, on-template React19/Vite6/Cap8 monorepo that is closer to launch than almost any other app in the fleet, but it has never built for iOS, has no App Store record, and the boot-gate/test-gate/iOS-pipeline plus PostHog and Capgo OTA all still need to land on main before it can ship.

store_status: TestFlight (CFBundleVersion 16/17 shipped per HANDOFF; brain reports build 18 later). NOT live on the App Store.
stack: pnpm monorepo (packages/shared pure scoring engine, packages/api Fastify 4 + Neon postgres.js, packages/web). Web = React 18.3 + Vite 5.4 + TypeScript + Capacitor 6 (NOT React 19/Cap 8 — manifest+package.json confirm 18/6; the Cap8/React19 upgrade the brain cites as PR #114 is NOT on this local main). lucide-react icons, @fontsource self-hosted fonts. API deployed to Azure Container Apps (deploy-azure.yml).
current_state: Most complete monorepo in the fleet and genuinely far along. 60 test files; shared engine is property-tested (fast-check) for skins/nassau/press/wolf/stableford/WHS/settlement. CI (ci.yml) gates lint+typecheck+tests across all 3 packages, Playwright WebKit+Chromium e2e with axe a11y, gitleaks+TruffleHog secret scan, CycloneDX SBOM. iOS ships via ios-depot.yml (Depot depot-macos-26, dispatch-only, CTO-triggered); Capgo OTA wired (deploy-ota.yml + notifyAppReady in main.tsx + autoUpdate in capacitor.config). Build 16 carried 18 CodeQL high-sev fixes + Wave 5.9 (brackets, spectator bets, GPS venue, round photos); Build 17 added the native Apple Watch app + home-screen widget + Live Activity + App Group (integrate_native_targets.rb pattern). Focus-group loop ran 11 rounds, CERTIFIED 14/16 (>=90%) against the 90-day-retention bar. The biggest gap: the paywall is UI-only — PaywallScreen.tsx CTA is onClick alert('On device this opens the App Store purchase via RevenueCat'); there is NO @revenuecat/purchases-capacitor dependency and no purchase/restore/entitlement flow.

features.design_system_uikit: yes — packages/web/src/theme/tokens.css is a real single-source design-token system (3 themes: Fairway/Twilight/Sunlight via data-theme) + components/ui primitives (Button/Card/Icon/ListRow). App-specific, not the shared fleet design-system package.
features.boot_render_gate: partial — a BootSplash component (components/boot/BootSplash.tsx, self-removing ~1.5s, pointer-transparent, reduced-motion fallback) + ErrorBoundary + e2e capture/nav specs exist, but there is NO boot-gate skill render gate (no WebKit @ iPhone 16 Pro spec that FAILS on a boot console.error/pageerror/stuck-splash/empty-DOM). e2e is screenshot/flow-based, not the fail-on-boot-error gate.
features.telemetry_posthog: partial — lib/observability.ts wires PostHog + Sentry behind a pure, unit-tested scrubPII() (redacts email/money/handles, autocapture off, sanitize_properties). PHI-safe by design (non-PHI ring). BUT it binds to window.posthog/window.Sentry no-ops rather than the npm SDKs, so unless the host page loads the vendor scripts, telemetry is a no-op; VITE_POSTHOG_KEY/VITE_SENTRY_DSN gate it. Not the shared fleet telemetry package.
features.ota_capgo_signed: partial — Capgo wired end to end (deploy-ota.yml uploads to production channel on web-layer pushes; main.tsx calls CapacitorUpdater.notifyAppReady; autoUpdate+resetWhenUpdate:false in config; rollbackOnCrashRate 99 in manifest). Prerequisite per manifest/workflow: the @capgo native plugin must be baked into an IPA (Build 19+) and CAPGO_TOKEN added before OTA is live. No evidence of channel signing/pinning beyond token auth.
features.paywall_revenuecat: no — PaywallScreen.tsx is a presentational screen only; CTA is an alert() placeholder; no @revenuecat SDK dependency in packages/web; no purchase/restore/entitlement enforcement. This is the #1 launch blocker for a paid app.
features.sentry: partial — Sentry initialized in observability.ts with beforeSend/beforeBreadcrumb PII scrubbing, but via window.Sentry no-op binding (no @sentry/* SDK dep) and DSN-gated; API has dd-trace dependency but Datadog not initialized in server.ts/index.ts. Effective crash reporting depends on the host script being present.
features.ten_million_splash_craft: yes — deep craft: airborne coin-flip BootSplash v3 (mp4 + 1/12 specular-sweep Easter egg + wolf crest), photoreal minted-coin renders, premium dark clubhouse UI, branded 1080x1080 share cards (Canvas), animated coin share clip (MediaRecorder), full marketing asset set + App Store screenshots. The brand bar is explicitly premium per CLAUDE.md.
features.focus_group_90: yes — focus-group-loop ran 11 rounds; R4 16/16, R7 16/16, R11 14/16 all >=90%; cataloged in docs/research/FOCUS_GROUP_ROUND_*.md. Three escalating bars (works / $4.99-Pro+5-star / 90-day-retention) all certified.
features.accessibility_gate: partial — axe-core wired into Playwright e2e (signin/scorecard/new-round/games-tab/nav specs + fixtures/a11y.ts), manifest gate axe:pass, WCAG-tuned contrast tokens (loss/gold corrected for AA, sunlight theme fixes), in-app text-size scale (--fs-scale). It is AA-style web a11y, not the senior-first 64x64/20pt hard gate the health apps use (this is a 17+ social app, so that bar is N/A).
features.app_health_medic: no — only a trivial GET /health -> {ok:true} in the API (server.ts:157). No app-health-medic skill instrumentation, no client boot health beacon, no fleet-medic memory-health wiring in the repo.

template_distance: easy-migrate — it is already a React + Vite + Capacitor pnpm monorepo with separated shared/api/web packages, design tokens, a paywall screen, telemetry lib, Capgo, and e2e. Closest in the fleet to the standardized template. The deltas are version bumps and package extraction, not a rewrite: (1) React 18.3->19 + Vite 5->5/6 + Capacitor 6->8 (the brain references an unmerged Cap8/React19 upgrade PR; not on local main); (2) lift its bespoke tokens.css/ui primitives, observability.ts, and auth/data layers into the shared design-system/telemetry/auth/data packages the template defines; (3) adopt the template's RevenueCat paywall package (it has none). No vanilla-JS www rewrite needed — that is the hard-rewrite case and Flatstick is not it.
launch_blockers: RevenueCat purchase flow is NOT wired — PaywallScreen CTA is an alert() placeholder, no @revenuecat/purchases-capacitor dep, no server-side entitlement enforcement. A paid app cannot launch without a real StoreKit/RevenueCat purchase + restore + entitlement-gated Pro flow.
Capgo OTA not yet live: the @capgo native plugin must be baked into an IPA (Build 19+) and CAPGO_TOKEN added to repo secrets before OTA can ship (per manifest + deploy-ota.yml prerequisite).
Native watch/widget/Live-Activity glance still shows SAMPLE data — publishMoneyToWatch() is ready but not called at the money-total source (watchBridge.ts); ship-quality requires real data wired.
@capacitor/haptics is a new native plugin that is a web no-op until its CocoaPod is baked into the next iOS build (CTO build lane).
Telemetry + Sentry bind to window.posthog/window.Sentry no-ops; unless the host loads the vendor scripts (or the SDKs are added), production crash/analytics capture is effectively off.
Apple-login physical-device verification still pending (TestFlight on the operator's iPhone 16 Pro — device-only QA).
Multi-round money recompute bug is deferred/latent (HANDOFF + brain) — must be closed before any multi-round event ships.
No real App Store submission yet — only TestFlight; store listing/screenshots exist but the submission + review pass is outstanding.
No App Store live build past TestFlight build 16/17 locally; build numbering = ASC CFBundleVersion, next = ASC max+1.
compliance_gates: No-money-handling firewall (FTC / gambling / app-store policy): Flatstick must NEVER hold, escrow, or move money — settlement is outbound Venmo/PayPal/Cash App links only (Splitwise model). This is load-bearing in the listing, EULA, privacy policy, and reviewer notes (ios/REVIEWER_NOTES.md). Framed as scorekeeping among friends, 17+, US-only. Any code or copy that weakens this is an App Store rejection / legal risk — human-owned.
17+ age rating + US-launch scoping (App Store review): betting/scoring social context requires the 17+ gate and US-only geo at launch.
Securities firewall: seller of record is InnerScope (OTC: INND) adjacent; keep all store metadata free of forward-looking/financial-performance language (INND is a public company).
recommended_path: Treat Flatstick as the fleet's reference easy-migrate and the first app to prove the standardized template end-to-end. Steps: (1) Land the pending Capacitor 8 + React 19 + Vite upgrade onto main (the brain's PR #114) so it matches the template baseline. (2) Wire the REAL RevenueCat flow from the template's paywall package: add @revenuecat/purchases-capacitor, implement purchase/restore, and enforce the Pro entitlement server-side (it already has the Pro feature gating UI + one-Pro-unlocks-the-group model). This is the gating work — nothing else matters until purchases work. (3) Finish Capgo: bake the native @capgo + @capacitor/haptics CocoaPods into a fresh Depot build (Build 19), add CAPGO_TOKEN, confirm OTA round-trips. (4) Wire publishMoneyToWatch() at the money-total source so the watch/widget/Live-Activity show real standings, not sample data. (5) Add the boot-gate render gate (the skill's WebKit @ iPhone 16 Pro fail-on-boot-error spec) and an app-health beacon; promote observability.ts to actually load/import the PostHog+Sentry SDKs (not window no-ops) via the shared telemetry package. (6) Extract its tokens.css/ui primitives + auth/data layers into the shared design-system/auth/data packages so it consumes the template, not a fork. (7) Device-verify Apple login on the iPhone 16 Pro, close the multi-round recompute bug, then dispatch ios-depot for the App Store submission build. Compliance gates (no-money-handling, 17+, INND securities) are human-owned and already documented — keep reviewer notes intact.
effort: M — closest app to the template; the dominant cost is wiring a real RevenueCat purchase/entitlement flow + finishing Capgo/native-plugin bakes + the template package extraction. Not an XL rewrite (it is already React/Vite/Capacitor monorepo), but more than an S because monetization is genuinely absent and version upgrades (Cap6->8) carry native-build risk.
one_line_verdict: The fleet's most complete and most template-ready app — premium craft, certified focus-group, strong CI and a real shared engine — but it cannot launch as a paid app until the placeholder paywall is replaced with a real RevenueCat purchase + entitlement flow and Capgo/native-plugin bakes are finished.

stack: React18 + Vite6/8 + Capacitor 6.2.1 pnpm monorepo (packages/mobile, api, db, shared). Mobile: TypeScript, Tailwind, Konsta UI, Zustand, React Router v6. Backend: Fastify 5 + Node 20 on Cloud Run, Neon Postgres + pgvector + Drizzle ORM, Backblaze B2 + Bunny CDN. AI via AIProvider adapter (OpenAI primary, Gemini fallback; Anthropic SDK forbidden). IAP RevenueCat. Telemetry Sentry. CI on Depot ubuntu; iOS on Depot macOS (depot-macos-26). appId com.innerscope.fourvault.
current_state: FourVault is a mature, well-structured COPPA kid-safe trading-card vault app: ~30 mobile screens, a property-tested Fastify API with full route tests, an in-process PGlite e2e harness (chromium+webkit) with an axe-core a11y gate, a security/supply-chain Guardian workflow (gitleaks/SBOM/OSV), and a real RevenueCat webhook + parental-gate entitlement model server-side. main is at a70c5e5 (HANDOFF 63644c2e) with the $10M VaultGate splash (5-state guard loop/PIN/Blaze cinematic) and a visual upgrade merged; CI is green; current branch claude/fourvault-splash-fix adds an e2e harness stub fix. Half-done/missing: the first Depot iOS build has never been dispatched (last TestFlight is the stale Codemagic build #70), the RevenueCat client purchase call is stubbed/commented out, and there is no PostHog, no Capgo OTA, and no boot/render gate.

Any PostHog or OTA rollout must preserve these carve-outs

recommended_path: 1) Get the EXISTING build live first: CTO sets the 4 ASC secrets and dispatches ios-depot.yml on main 63644c2e (build_number = ASC max+1, upload_to_testflight=true); prove the Depot signing path green and tag tf/<version>+<build>. 2) Make the paywall real: wire the actual @revenuecat/purchases-capacitor purchasePackage call in PaywallScreen and validate the webhook->entitlement flip end to end. 3) Land the boot/render gate (port skills/boot-gate as a WebKit @ iPhone-16-Pro boot-smoke spec that fails on console.error/pageerror/stuck-splash) into e2e + the CI gate, given the heavy VaultGate cinematic boot path. 4) THEN migrate onto the standardized template: bump Capacitor 6->8 / React 18->19 / Vite->5, adopt the design-system/nav/telemetry/auth/data/paywall packages, and add COPPA-safe PostHog (kid-screen carve-out) + Capgo signed OTA + app-health-medic. 5) Provision Cloud Run env (FCM, eBay, pooled DATABASE_URL), upload ASC screenshots, get es consent strings legal-reviewed, set main branch protection, submit. Keep the AIProvider/Recognition/Pricing adapters and COPPA rails intact throughout.
effort: L - solid React+Vite monorepo foundation and a real backend, but Capacitor6/React18->template versions, three missing $10M features (PostHog, Capgo OTA, app-health-medic), a stubbed paywall, an unproven Depot signing path, and a full COPPA-preserving migration add up to large.
one_line_verdict: A genuinely well-built, COPPA-disciplined React18+Vite+Capacitor6 monorepo with $10M-grade splash craft and a real backend, but it has never shipped a Depot build (stale Codemagic #70), its paywall is stubbed, and it lacks PostHog/OTA/boot-gate/health-medic - a moderate template migration plus an L-sized feature-and-launch push, not a rewrite.

That scaffold is a 5-file, 48KB vanilla-JS www app: a 5-tab shell (Today/Relief/Flow/Program/Profile) where 4 of 5 tabs are static "Coming soon" placeholders, plus a hello-audio play/stop button on Flow that emits a single 220Hz sine test tone (an explicit STUB, not the ie-01 generative engine). 18 trivial unit tests pass (nav/audio-helper/i18n). i18n is en + it only. No app.manifest.json. template_distance: hard-rewrite; the shippable layer is a no-bundler vanilla-JS www app (plain script tags, browser-global + CommonJS dual-export pattern), which shares zero code with the React19+Vite5+Capacitor8 pnpm-monorepo template (no React, no Vite, no pnpm workspace, no shared packages). Getting onto the template is effectively a from-scratch rebuild. The one mitigant: this app has almost no real product code yet (4 of 5 screens are placeholders, audio is a test-tone stub), so there is very little to throw away. Rebuilding fresh on the template is cheaper here than for a feature-complete vanilla-JS app like iHEARtest.

Concretely: (1) scaffold InnerEase from the org app-template (React19+Vite5+Capacitor8 pnpm monorepo) reusing the shared packages (design-system/tokens.css+Tailwind v4+lucide, nav, telemetry, paywall, data, config), inheriting boot-gate, PostHog (EVENTS-ONLY, replay fully disabled per the health-app PHI-safe rule since InnerEase shows wellness/assessment results), Capgo signed OTA, RevenueCat paywall, Sentry, and app-health-medic for free. Zero observability: no Sentry project and no PostHog, so a shipped build would be a crash/usage black box
Marketing/version metadata unset: CFBundleVersion/MARKETING_VERSION are build-injected placeholders ($(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION)); CTO must resolve ASC max+1 and set a real marketing version
Content gaps that affect store quality: story-time shows English-only (Mary Had a Little Lamb all pending_curation); High Valyrian (26) and Na'vi (3) dictionaries are thin
compliance_gates: IP / franchise firewall (CLO/legal + Matt): descriptive language names only, no trademarked fonts/marks (no real Aurebesh font), no implied endorsement by Paramount/HBO/Disney/Tolkien Estate. CPO pre-launch audit explicitly flags 'Fictionary=IP' as its required release rail and notes IP/licensing risk on franchise languages.

Licensing / GPLv3 build wall (engineering-owned but legally load-bearing): GPLv3 Na'vi + Dothraki data MUST be physically stripped from the App Store binary by scripts/build-native.mjs (npm run build:native) before cap sync; shipping them in the IPA is a license violation. ios-depot.yml correctly calls build:native, but it is unvalidated.

Honesty/consumer rail (FTC-adjacent, product-owned): Tier-C ciphers must never be labeled real languages; Tier-A output must always show the word-by-word quality note; no fabricated conlang content and no pending_curation shown. Enforced in engine + a regression test today; keep it.
App Store release-readiness gate does NOT yet exist for Fictionary (CPO flagged that only PlantID has one); needed before submission.
No fabricated social proof on any paywall/landing (FTC + Apple 2.3) - low risk here since v1 is free/non-commercial with no paywall.
recommended_path: Two-stage. STAGE 1 (ship the existing app, unblock TestFlight fast, S-M): merge the test-gate CI + ios-depot branches to main; CTO sets the 4 ASC secrets and does the first workflow_dispatch (expect 1-2 port bugs); resolve CFBundleVersion (ASC max+1) + a real marketing version; verify build:native actually strips GPL data in the IPA; get it onto the iPhone 16 Pro via TestFlight (this is the real boot/device proof the repo has never had); finish/curate the one story or ship story-time as English-only-labeled; run the focus-group-loop on the ACTUAL committed build to replace the phantom-branch score; CLO/CPO sign the IP rail + create the release gate. This gets a clean, honest v1 to the App Store without the template. STAGE 2 (onto the standardized platform + $10M features, M-L, after Stage-1 learnings): migrate to the app-template shell (pnpm, React19, Capacitor8) adopting the shared design-system/nav/telemetry/auth/data packages; wire PostHog (privacy-safe, respecting the no-tracking principle - opt-in or anonymized only), Sentry, Capgo signed OTA, the boot-gate render spec, app-health-medic, and the accessibility gate (axe/Lighthouse). RevenueCat/paywall is a product decision, not a default, since v1 is intentionally free. Because screens are clean and the engine is framework-free, the port is mechanical, not a rewrite.
effort: M - a working React/Vite/Cap monorepo that needs first-build validation + the standard shared-package/telemetry/OTA/gate layer bolted on; not a rewrite, but ~7 missing $10M features and a Cap6->8 / npm->pnpm / React18->19 template adoption.
one_line_verdict: A clean, honest, well-built React18/Vite5/Capacitor6 translator app that compiles and tests green but has never been built for a device and is missing every $10M feature (no PostHog/Sentry/OTA/paywall/boot-gate/design-system) - moderate distance from the template, IP-firewall and GPL-strip are the human gates, and the brain's React19/PostHog/55-test claims are phantom-branch drift the repo does not back up.

store_status: TestFlight (CFBundleVersion 2, tagged tf/1.0+2, VALID, export-compliance cleared). Not yet submitted for public App Store review. Backend (Azure Functions) deployed and LIVE, so the Build 1/2 green-screen-on-empty-VITE_API_BASE_URL incident is resolved without a rebuild.
stack: React 18.3 + Vite 8 + TypeScript + Capacitor 8.4 (com.innerscope.plantid, appName PlantID). SINGLE npm package (NOT a pnpm monorepo, no pnpm-workspace). Azure Functions backend in functions/ (Node 22, LIVE at plantid-api.azurewebsites.net, ai-vision recognition via Azure OpenAI gpt-4o / Vertex Gemini 2.5 Flash, ASPCA toxicity, llm care). iOS via Depot ios-depot.yml (depot-macos-26, dispatch-only, CTO-triggered). Telemetry: @sentry/capacitor + posthog-js. RevenueCat purchases-capacitor 13. i18n en+es. NOTE: React 18 + npm-single-package + Azure backend diverge from the fleet template (React19 + pnpm monorepo + Neon/Fastify).
current_state: A genuinely well-built, mostly-complete React+Vite+Capacitor app on TestFlight Build 2 with a live Azure Functions backend. Verified against the repo (main @ f34e84d, last push 2026-06-24): full screen set (Identify, IdResult, CareGuide, HealthCheck, Greenhouse, PetalChat, PhotoTimeline, PlantHacks, Paywall, Settings, AiConsent), a hand-rolled UI kit, RevenueCat paywall with A/B price products ($29.99/$34.99), typed PHI-safe PostHog analytics, Sentry, 6 Vitest specs (incl. axe WCAG 2.2 AA), and an animated Veo video splash with mascots. The biggest live work is PR #15 (focus-group-loop, DRAFT, 94 commits, branch claude/ecstatic-gauss-oa1v1g) which polished the app to 9.25-9.57/10 across customer/pro/investor panels and is blocked only by Azure OpenAI gpt-4o TPM quota (infra), not product. Half-done: no top-level React ErrorBoundary, no boot-smoke CI gate, no OTA (manifest claims Capgo but there is no @capgo dependency), and the PostHog session-recording dashboard toggle is still off per HANDOFF.

features.design_system_uikit: partial: a real, consistent local UI kit (src/components/ui Button/EmptyState/ErrorState/LoadingState/ToxicityPill/BottomSheet/BottomTabBar) using CSS custom properties (--color-forest, --radius-xl). It is app-local, NOT the shared fleet design-system package.
features.boot_render_gate: no: no boot-smoke Playwright spec and no top-level React ErrorBoundary in main.tsx/App.tsx. The original green-screen risk is partially mitigated (SplashScreen.tsx calls CapSplash.hide and has a 10s hard-cap navigation fallback with .catch/.finally, and the backend is now live), but a render-time throw still yields a blank/green screen with no recovery and nothing gates it in CI.
features.telemetry_posthog: yes: posthog-js wired in src/main.tsx with autocapture off, person_profiles identified_only, inputs masked, img/video/canvas blocked; plus a typed wrapper src/utils/analytics.ts that explicitly never logs photos/plant-names/location/RC userId. Non-PHI ring. Caveat: session-recording dashboard toggle still off (HANDOFF action item).
features.ota_capgo_signed: no: app.manifest.json lists ota.provider=capgo, but there is NO @capgo/capacitor-updater (or any updater) dependency in package.json and no OTA wiring in src. Aspirational only.
features.paywall_revenuecat: yes: @revenuecat/purchases-capacitor wired via RevenueCatContext + useRevenueCat; PaywallScreen is context-aware (8 trigger contexts), restore + fallback handling, A/B annual products plantid_annual_2999/_3499. RC project proj8d70e817 verified against ASC in the CTO ledger.
features.sentry: yes: @sentry/capacitor + @sentry/react wired in src/main.tsx with replay (maskAllInputs, blockAllMedia), beforeSend strips email/ip, tracesSampleRate gated by env. Project plantid DSN in app.manifest.
features.ten_million_splash_craft: partial-to-yes: animated Veo 3.1 video splash (3 character-consistent scenes), Petal mascot system, and focus-group-loop polish (PR #15) lifting customers 9.25 / pros 9.5 / investors 9.57. Strong craft, but the polish PR is unmerged (draft).
features.focus_group_90: partial: focus-group-loop run to Round 9 at 9.25-9.57/10 (>=90%) among responding personas, BUT the official gate shows NOT-YET because ~9/20 personas 429 on the Azure OpenAI gpt-4o TPM quota and score 0. Lives in unmerged DRAFT PR #15. Pass is an infra (quota) + merge step away.
features.accessibility_gate: yes: src/tests/accessibility.test.tsx runs axe-core gating on critical+serious WCAG 2a/2aa/21aa/22aa violations, executed by Vitest in CI (ci.yml Test step). Plus i18n-parity test. Component-level coverage; full-screen a11y deferred to (not-yet-present) Playwright.
features.app_health_medic: no: no evidence of the app-health-medic harness in the repo (no health-medic spec, workflow, or skill wiring). The fleet-medic skill exists at the toolkit level but is not wired into PlantID.

template_distance: moderate: closer than a vanilla-JS www app but not on-template. It is already React + Vite + TypeScript + Capacitor 8 with adapter-pattern providers, so the paradigm matches. The real distance is structural: (1) it is a SINGLE npm package, not a pnpm monorepo with design-system/nav/telemetry/auth/data/paywall packages, so all shared logic (UI kit, analytics, RevenueCat, recognition adapter) is in-app and would need extraction into template packages; (2) React 18 not React 19, Vite 8 not Vite 5; (3) backend is Azure Functions, not the template's Neon/Fastify pattern; (4) routing is react-router BrowserRouter. Migrating means re-homing the app into the monorepo and swapping the local UI kit for the design-system package, not a ground-up rewrite.
launch_blockers: No top-level React ErrorBoundary in main.tsx/App.tsx and no boot-smoke CI gate: a render-time exception (or the historical empty-VITE_API_BASE_URL class of bug) still produces a blank/green screen with no recovery and nothing catches it before TestFlight. This is the boot-gate the fleet built specifically because of PlantID's own green-screen incident.
PR #15 (focus-group polish, branch claude/ecstatic-gauss-oa1v1g, 30 files / +1948) is still a DRAFT and unmerged; the production-quality polish is not on main and not in a build.

Focus-group gate not officially passed: blocked by Azure OpenAI gpt-4o TPM quota (9/20 personas 429). Raise the quota + merge the fgl.mjs maxTokens 900->1500 fix to claude-tools, then re-run Round 10.
No OTA: manifest declares Capgo but there is no @capgo updater dependency or signing/pinning wiring, so no signed OTA channel exists. Cannot hot-fix the JS layer post-ship.
PostHog session-recording dashboard toggle still off (HANDOFF action item); SDK is configured but recording is not enabled.
No app-health-medic harness wired; no Playwright/e2e boot or smoke coverage on device.
App Store public submission not started (screenshots, ASO metadata exist as docs but the listing/review submission is a human gate).
compliance_gates: FTC/no-medical: non-PHI consumer utility; manifest enforces noMedicalClaims + noEdibilityClaims. Edibility/toxicity safety rail (fungi disclaimer non-dismissible, ASPCA citation required, 'consult a vet' caution, 'signs not diagnosis' framing) is asserted in app.manifest compliance block and needs a human CCO/CMO sign-off before wider rollout per the brain/ledger.
Toxicity accuracy (human-owned): never present LLM-guessed pet toxicity as fact; must cite the authoritative ASPCA dataset. Safety-critical review gate.

No securities/INND exposure (consumer app, clean) and no COPPA (content rating 4+, no kid-data collection, no parental-gate requirement) - both effectively clear but the 4+ rating + no-age-gate decision is human-locked (gateDecisions 2026-06-16).
Privacy: EXIF strip + api-call-only image retention claimed in manifest; verify in backend before public submission. Privacy policy is a template doc, needs counsel review before listing.
recommended_path: Ship the public launch FIRST (it is close), then converge onto the template. Step 1 (launch, L-effort): merge PR #15 to main after raising the Azure OpenAI gpt-4o TPM quota and re-running focus-group Round 10 to an official >=90%; add a top-level React ErrorBoundary in main.tsx (wrap App, log to Sentry, render a safe fallback) and port the boot-gate boot-smoke Playwright spec into CI (this directly closes PlantID's own green-screen class of bug); enable the PostHog session-recording toggle; cut Build 3, dispatch ios-depot.yml (CTO-only), and run the human App Store submission (screenshots/ASO already drafted). Step 2 (add the remaining $10M features, M): wire Capgo OTA (signed + crash-rate auto-rollback per the manifest's 99.0 threshold) and add app-health-medic + a Playwright on-device smoke. Step 3 (template convergence, L): re-home PlantID into the React19+Vite+pnpm monorepo, swap the local src/components/ui kit for the shared design-system package, and extract telemetry/paywall/recognition-adapter into the shared packages; keep the Azure Functions backend (do not force it onto Neon/Fastify just to match - it is live and adapter-isolated). Do the template move AFTER public launch so it does not block revenue.
effort: L - app is ~85% to a public launch (close: ErrorBoundary + boot-gate + merge PR #15 + quota + submit = days-to-weeks), but full template convergence (monorepo re-home + design-system swap) adds the bulk of the L.
one_line_verdict: PlantID is the second-most-launch-ready non-shipped app in the portfolio: a polished React+Vite+Capacitor app on TestFlight Build 2 with a live backend, real RevenueCat paywall, PHI-safe telemetry, and an axe a11y gate, blocked from public launch mainly by a missing ErrorBoundary/boot-gate, an unmerged 9.5/10 focus-group PR (Azure quota), and no OTA; launch it now, converge onto the pnpm/React19 template after.
